heading: Waterway Watch Program
label: 70122 Waterway Watch Program
notes: Amendments2016— substituted “Watch Program” for “watch program” in section catchline.Pub. L. 114–120
amendments: Amendments2016— substituted “Watch Program” for “watch program” in section catchline.Pub. L. 114–120

children.heading: .—Program Established
children.label: a .—Program Established
children.text: There is hereby established, within the Coast Guard, the America’s Waterway Watch Program.

children.heading: .—Purpose
children.label: b .—Purpose
children.text: The Secretary shall administer the Program in a manner that promotes voluntary reporting of activities that may indicate that a person or persons may be preparing to engage or engaging in a violation of law relating to a threat or an act of terrorism (as that term is defined in ) against a vessel, facility, port, or waterway.section 3077 of title 18

children.heading: .—Information
children.label: 1 .—Information
children.text: The Secretary may establish, as an element of the Program, a network of individuals and community-based organizations that encourage the public and industry to recognize activities referred to in subsection (b), promote voluntary reporting of such activity, and enhance the situational awareness within the Nation’s ports and waterways. Such network shall, to the extent practicable, be conducted in cooperation with Federal, State, and local law enforcement agencies.

children.label: A
children.text: observing and reporting on covered activities; and

children.label: B
children.text: sharing such reports and coordinating the response by Federal, State, and local law enforcement agencies.
shall not be a prerequisite to eligibility for, or receipt of, any other service or assistance from, or to participation in, any other program of any kind; and
shall not require disclosure of information regarding the individual reporting covered activities or, for proprietary purposes, the location of such individual.

children.heading: .—Coordination
children.label: e .—Coordination
children.text: The Secretary shall coordinate the Program with other like watch programs. The Secretary shall submit, concurrent with the President’s budget submission for each fiscal year, a report on coordination of the Program and like watch programs within the Department of Homeland Security to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation of the Senate and the Committee on Homeland Security of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: .—Authorization of Appropriations
children.label: f .—Authorization of Appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated for the purposes of this section $3,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2011 through 2016. Such funds shall remain available until expended.
